title: LangTeach Curriculum Level
description: Schema for a single course-level curriculum entry. Supports both flat-objectives (Iberia) and per-unit (Instituto Educativo) structures.

level.description: Sub-level identifier as used in the source document (e.g. 'A1.1', 'B1.2+', 'C2.6')

cefr_level.description: Broad CEFR level this course belongs to

institution.description: Name of the institution that produced this curriculum document

source_file.description: Filename of the source PDF this data was extracted from

textbook.description: Textbook used in this course. null when no textbook is used.

units_covered.description: Textbook unit numbers covered in this course

communicative_objectives.description: Flat list of course-level communicative objectives (present in Iberia PROGRAMA files)

units.description: Per-unit content breakdown (present in Instituto Educativo files)

unit_number.description: Unit number within the course (may be 0 for introductory units)

textbook_ref.description: Textbook unit reference (e.g. 'AULA 1 U.0'). null when source document has no textbook column.

overall_goal.description: Main communicative task or project for this unit. null when source document has no overall goal column.

communicative_functions.description: Contenidos funcionales: what the student can do communicatively

vocabulary_themes.description: Contenidos léxicos (A1-B2) or Tipos de texto y léxico (C1-C2)

learning_strategies.description: El componente estratégico: learning and metacognitive strategies

cultural_content.description: Contenidos culturales: cultural references and content

notes.description: Free-text notes about the source document or extraction decisions for this level (e.g. column naming differences in C1-C2 Instituto Educativo files)

exam_prep.description: Reserved for exam preparation curricula (DELE, DALF, etc.). null for general-learning courses.

exam_components.description: Exam skill components covered (e.g. 'comprensión lectora', 'expresión escrita')

grammar_map_entry.title: Grammar Map Entry
grammar_map_entry.description: Schema for a grammar map entry (broad CEFR level, one institution)

cefr_descriptor.description: Official CEFR can-do descriptor for this level

grammar_resources.description: Grammar structures introduced at this level

vocabulary_themes.description: Lexical themes covered at this level
